name: Auvik Network Management REST API
what_it_does: Auvik network management REST API for managed service providers and IT teams to automatically discover, map, and monitor network infrastructure — including routers, switches, firewalls, access points, and endpoints — enabling automated network topology mapping, configuration backup, bandwidth monitoring, traffic analysis, and network troubleshooting through Auvik's cloud-based network management platform. Enables AI agents to manage device inventory for network device discovery and cataloging automation, handle network topology for visual network map and connectivity automation, access configuration backup for network device config archival automation, retrieve bandwidth monitoring for interface utilization and traffic automation, manage alert management for network threshold and event alert automation, handle flow analysis for NetFlow and traffic pattern analysis automation, access device details for network device health and status automation, retrieve configuration change detection for network config drift monitoring automation, manage MSP multi-tenant for client network monitoring across sites automation, and integrate Auvik with PSA tools for ConnectWise and Autotask network alert ticketing automation.
use_cases: Automatically discovering and mapping client network topology for MSP network management automation agents
Monitoring network device health and bandwidth utilization for MSP NOC automation agents
Backing up network device configurations and detecting config changes for network compliance automation agents
Analyzing network traffic patterns and troubleshooting connectivity for network ops automation agents
not_for: Endpoint device management (Auvik is network infrastructure, not server/PC endpoint management)
Network security operations (Auvik is network monitoring/management, not SIEM or firewall management)
Application performance monitoring (Auvik is network layer, not application response time monitoring)
best_when: A managed service provider or network operations team wanting AI agents to automate network discovery, topology mapping, device monitoring, config backup, and bandwidth analysis through Auvik's cloud-based network management platform built for MSPs.
avoid_when: SNMP ACCESS REQUIRED: Auvik requires SNMP read access to network devices; automated no-SNMP assumption creates limited_discovery for network devices without SNMP configured; automated must configure SNMP on managed network devices. COLLECTOR DEPLOYMENT REQUIRED: Auvik requires on-site collector deployment for network access; automated cloud-direct assumption creates collector_required; automated must deploy Auvik collector at each client site. FLOW DATA REQUIRES CONFIGURATION: NetFlow/sFlow traffic analysis requires enabling flow export on network devices; automated auto-flow assumption creates no_traffic_data without flow export configuration; automated must configure flow export on routers and switches. CREDENTIAL MANAGEMENT IS CRITICAL: Network device credentials must be configured in Auvik for config backup; automated auto-credential assumption creates backup_failure for devices without credentials; automated must securely manage device credential vault.

auth.notes: Auvik uses API key (username + API key) for network management REST API. REST API with JSON:API spec. Waterloo, Ontario HQ. Founded 2011 by Alex Hoff, Doug Murray, and Marc Morin. Acquired by Vista Equity Partners 2020. Products: Network Management, Network Topology, Config Backup, Traffic Analysis, Remote Access. 6,000+ MSP partners. Competes with SolarWinds, PRTG, and LogicMonitor for MSP network management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial for MSPs; production requires Auvik partner agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-billable-device monthly pricing; Essentials and Performance tiers; MSP partner pricing
pricing.notes: Waterloo ON. Vista Equity. Per-billable-device. 6,000+ MSP partners. Cloud network management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; device and topology APIs throttled per partner tier

known_agent_gotchas: JSON:API FORMAT REQUIRED: Auvik API uses JSON:API specification for all requests; automated standard-REST assumption creates format_mismatch for non-JSON:API compliant calls; automated must implement JSON:API filtering, pagination, and include syntax

TENANT SCOPE CONTROLS VISIBILITY: Auvik API calls are scoped to tenant; automated cross-tenant assumption creates permission_denied for MSPs trying to access all clients in single call; automated must specify tenant context per API call

BILLABLE VS NON-BILLABLE DEVICES: Auvik categorizes devices as billable or non-billable; automated uniform-device assumption creates unexpected_billing for devices Auvik auto-classifies as billable; automated must understand billable device classification

TOPOLOGY DATA REQUIRES DISCOVERY: Network topology is populated after Auvik collector discovery; automated instant-topology assumption creates empty_topology for newly added sites; automated must wait for discovery completion before querying topology

CONFIG BACKUP FREQUENCY IS SCHEDULED: Configuration backups run on schedule, not real-time; automated latest-config assumption creates stale_config for recently changed devices not yet backed up; automated must account for backup schedule when querying config data
agent_readiness.security_notes: Network management. SOC2, GDPR. API key. US/CA. Network device config and topology data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Network monitoring. SOC2, GDPR. API key. US/CA. Network device and configuration data.
